_assumptions: Each screen object includes 'name', 'purpose', 'state', and 'components' fields
Components are described as objects with 'type', 'label', and 'behavior' fields where applicable
Screen 'state' field captures the different modes/phases a screen can be in
Transitions between screens/states are implicit based on user actions and game logic
Visual styling and layout specifics are out of scope for this screen map
Component 'behavior' describes interaction patterns and state changes, not implementation details
Conditional components (e.g., Insurance, Split) are listed with their availability constraints
All screens assume client-side rendering with no server calls
Local storage persistence is handled at the application level, not per-screen
Error handling UI is inferred from functional constraints where not explicitly specified
The 'Betting Panel' is treated as a state of the main Table screen rather than a separate screen
Strategy Hint is a toggle component that modifies display state rather than a separate screen
Stats Panel is treated as an overlay/modal accessible from the main Table screen
Chip denominations and exact button labels are implementation details left unspecified

screens.name: Table / Play Screen
screens.purpose: Primary game interface where all betting, dealing, player actions, and round resolution occur

components.label: Bankroll Display
components.behavior: Shows current chip total, updates after each round resolution

components.label: Shoe Indicator
components.behavior: Shows cards remaining or proximity to reshuffle threshold (~25%)

components.label: Dealer Hand Area
components.behavior: Displays dealer cards (one face-down during player turn), hand total (hidden until dealer plays), updates during dealer play phase

components.label: Player Hand Area
components.behavior: Displays player card(s), hand total with soft/hard indicator, supports multiple hands when split

components.label: Betting Panel
components.behavior: Active during betting_phase; contains chip selector, current bet display, and confirm button; disabled after bet confirmed

subcomponents.label: Chip Selector
subcomponents.behavior: Allows player to select chip denominations to build bet amount

subcomponents.label: Current Bet Amount
subcomponents.behavior: Shows total bet being placed, updates as chips selected

subcomponents.label: Confirm Bet / Deal
subcomponents.behavior: Validates bet <= bankroll, transitions to deal_phase, disabled if bet invalid or zero

components.label: Hit
components.behavior: Active during player_action_phase, deals one additional card to current hand, recalculates total, checks for bust

components.label: Stand
components.behavior: Active during player_action_phase, ends player action on current hand, advances to next split hand or dealer_play_phase

components.label: Double Down
components.behavior: Active only on first action of a hand, only if bankroll >= current bet; doubles bet, deals exactly one card, automatically stands

components.label: Split
components.behavior: Active only on first action when two cards are a pair and bankroll >= current bet; creates two hands, places equal bet on second hand, deals one card to each

components.label: Insurance Offer
components.behavior: Appears in insurance_decision_phase when dealer shows Ace; allows player to bet up to half original bet; accept/decline buttons; pays 2:1 if dealer has blackjack

components.label: Strategy Hint
components.behavior: Available during player_action_phase; when enabled, displays recommended action (Hit/Stand/Double/Split) per basic strategy for current hand vs dealer up-card

components.label: Open Stats
components.behavior: Opens Stats Panel overlay/modal at any time

screens.name: Round Result Overlay
screens.purpose: Displays outcome of completed round and prompts player to continue

components.label: Outcome Message
components.behavior: Shows result text: 'You Win!', 'You Lose', 'Push', 'Blackjack!', or 'Bust'

components.label: Payout Amount
components.behavior: Shows chips won/lost or 'Bet Returned' for push; blackjack pays 3:2, regular win pays 1:1

components.label: Updated Bankroll
components.behavior: Shows new bankroll total after payout applied

components.label: Play Again
components.behavior: Dismisses overlay, resets table to betting_phase, clears hands, preserves bankroll and updated stats

screens.name: Stats Panel
screens.purpose: Displays session statistics and provides bankroll reset control

components.label: Hands Played
components.behavior: Shows total count of completed hands in current session

components.label: Wins
components.behavior: Shows count of won hands (including blackjack)

components.label: Losses
components.behavior: Shows count of lost hands

components.label: Pushes
components.behavior: Shows count of push outcomes

components.label: Win Rate
components.behavior: Shows percentage calculated from session results

components.label: Current Streak
components.behavior: Shows consecutive wins or losses (exact streak logic unspecified)

components.label: Biggest Single-Hand Win
components.behavior: Shows largest payout amount from any single hand in session

components.label: Reset Bankroll / Stats
components.behavior: Clears all stats to zero, resets bankroll to starting amount (e.g., 1000), updates local storage; confirmation dialog unspecified

components.label: Close
components.behavior: Dismisses Stats Panel, returns focus to Table / Play Screen

globalBehaviors.description: Bankroll and session stats persist across page reloads via browser local storage; no server-side storage
6-deck shoe reshuffles automatically when cards remaining drop below ~25%; reshuffle occurs between hands, never mid-hand
All bet-related actions (initial bet, double down, split, insurance) validate that player has sufficient bankroll; insufficient funds disable respective controls
Dealer automatically hits until reaching hard 17 or any 17+, stands on soft 17; no player input during dealer play phase
Automatic calculation of hand totals with soft/hard detection (ace counted as 11 when possible without busting); bust detection at total > 21
Card dealing and flipping use short, non-blocking animations; no artificial delays that harm responsiveness

unspecifiedBehaviors: Exact chip denominations available in Chip Selector
Whether Betting Panel is inline or a distinct modal
Whether Round Result Overlay is dismissible by clicking outside or only via Play Again button
Whether Stats Panel is a sidebar, collapsible panel, or modal
UI behavior when bankroll reaches zero (game over state vs. auto-reset vs. manual reset prompt)
Whether bankroll/stats reset requires a confirmation dialog
Error messaging for insufficient bankroll during bet placement
Whether dealer reveals hole card when all player hands bust
How split hands are counted in session stats (one hand or two hands played)
Exact win rate calculation formula (wins/total vs. wins/(wins+losses))
Fallback behavior if local storage is unavailable or fails
Visual treatment of Strategy Hint recommendation display
